implementedFixes.description: screenshot_client_communication now gets client_message_update BEFORE binding check. Binding only affects which actions are included, not the output mode.
create_internal_note added as safe fallback action for ambiguous_needs_input. No contactId required — unlinked note until advisor resolves client.
createInternalNote always added alongside attachDocumentToClient. Attach-only result eliminated for supporting_reference_set.

cases.caseName: Single communication screenshot — no active client
cases.expectedBehavior: client_message_update with create_internal_note + create_task (even without client)
cases.actualBehavior: FIXED (Fix 1): client_message_update — create_internal_note + create_task proposed; attach_document correctly excluded (no binding)
cases.executionPlanSummary: 2 actions: createInternalNote + createTask (no attach without binding)
disabledReasons: planClientMessageUpdate: attach_document only added for bound_client_confident
guardrailsTriggered: BINDING_VIOLATION (G2) — write actions present but binding not confident; safe actions (note/task) pass through
cases.routeDecisionReason: resolveOutputMode: screenshot_client_communication check now fires BEFORE binding check (Fix 1)
cases.rootCauseHypothesis: RESOLVED. Binding check was before inputType check — now reordered. Communication screenshots always get client_message_update.

cases.caseName: Single communication screenshot — with active client
cases.expectedBehavior: client_message_update with note, task and attach
cases.actualBehavior: CORRECT: client_message_update — create_internal_note + create_task + attach_document
cases.rootCauseHypothesis: Works correctly. However, this path ONLY works when client is active before upload.

cases.caseName: Single document-like image — no active client
cases.expectedBehavior: ambiguous_needs_input with at least create_internal_note as safe fallback
cases.actualBehavior: FIXED (Fix 2): ambiguous_needs_input — create_internal_note now offered as unlinked safe fallback
disabledReasons: planStructuredFactIntake: attach_document only added for bound_client_confident || bound_case_confident
cases.routeDecisionReason: resolveOutputMode binding check → ambiguous_needs_input (correct for documents without binding)
cases.rootCauseHypothesis: RESOLVED. ambiguous_needs_input now always includes create_internal_note as unlinked safe fallback.

cases.caseName: Front+back identity document — no active client
cases.expectedBehavior: identity_contact_intake — create-contact draft from extracted data
cases.actualBehavior: ambiguous_needs_input (from planner); identity_contact_intake only possible if multimodal is enabled and extracts identity facts
cases.executionPlanSummary: identity path: createContact + attachDocumentToClient (if multimodal enabled); else: null
disabledReasons: detectIdentityContactIntakeSignals requires facts from multimodal pass
Without multimodal pass, factBundle.facts is empty → detectIdentityContactIntakeSignals returns false
cases.routeDecisionReason: orchestrator step 12: detectIdentityContactIntakeSignals → depends on multimodal feature flag
cases.rootCauseHypothesis: Identity contact intake path REQUIRES multimodal pass to extract id_doc_is_identity_document, id_doc_first_name, id_doc_last_name facts. If isImageIntakeMultimodalEnabledForUser() returns false (feature flag off), identity intake never fires.
cases.recommendedFixArea: feature-flag.ts + image-intake-config.ts: verify multimodal is enabled for production tenants; document dependency

cases.caseName: Front+back identity document — active client MISMATCH
cases.expectedBehavior: identity_contact_intake with mismatch warning; suppressedActiveClientId for CTA
cases.actualBehavior: CORRECT: clientBinding reset to insufficient_binding with source='identity_context_mismatch'; suppressedActiveClientId preserved; response-mapper shows CTA 'Otevřít kartu klienta'
cases.executionPlanSummary: createContact + attachDocumentToClient; BINDING_VIOLATION filtered in mapper for identity mode
guardrailsTriggered: BINDING_VIOLATION (filtered by response-mapper for identity mode)
cases.routeDecisionReason: orchestrator step 14: identityDocumentLikelyMatchesActiveContact → mismatch → binding reset with suppressedActiveClientId
cases.responseMapperPath: buildIntakeMessage → identity mode → routeMismatch=true → 'Doklad vypadá na jinou osobu...'
cases.rootCauseHypothesis: Logic works correctly. Potential issue: identityDocumentLikelyMatchesActiveContact uses token overlap — may be inaccurate for compound names or diacritics.
cases.recommendedFixArea: identity-active-context-mismatch.ts: normalize names (diacritics, name order) before token comparison

cases.caseName: Front+back identity document — active client MATCHES
cases.expectedBehavior: attach-only to existing client (not createContact — client exists)
cases.actualBehavior: identity_contact_intake with createContact proposed — duplicate client risk
cases.executionPlanSummary: createContact + attachDocumentToClient — G2 exempt for identity mode
cases.routeDecisionReason: identityDocumentLikelyMatchesActiveContact → match → binding stays bound_client_confident → buildIdentityContactIntakeActionPlan called anyway
cases.rootCauseHypothesis: When document matches active client, orchestrator still proposes createContact. Should propose attach-only when client is already identified. Risk of duplicate contact creation.
cases.recommendedFixArea: orchestrator.ts step 12-14: when identityDocumentLikelyMatchesActiveContact → match → use attach-only plan instead of full identity plan

cases.caseName: Multi-image document set (3-4 images) — supporting_reference_set
cases.actualBehavior: FIXED (Fix 3): supporting_reference_image — attachDocumentToClient + createInternalNote both always present
cases.routeDecisionReason: documentSetResult.decision === 'supporting_reference_set' → V4 retains attach + always adds note (Fix 3)
cases.rootCauseHypothesis: RESOLVED. buildActionPlanV4 now always adds createInternalNote for supporting_reference_set.

cases.caseName: Mixed set: communication screenshot + document image
cases.expectedBehavior: Process each type or at minimum ambiguous with at least create_internal_note fallback
cases.actualBehavior: PARTIALLY FIXED (Fix 2): ambiguous_needs_input — create_internal_note now offered as fallback; attach_document still missing
disabledReasons: resolveOutputMode: mixed_or_uncertain_image still → ambiguous_needs_input (correct — type is unclear)
attach_document not proposed for ambiguous mode
cases.routeDecisionReason: mixed_or_uncertain_image → ambiguous_needs_input; Fix 2 added note fallback
cases.rootCauseHypothesis: Partially resolved. mixed_or_uncertain_image with bound client now has at least note option. attach_document for mixed+bound is a potential next fix.
cases.recommendedFixArea: planner.ts → resolveOutputMode: mixed_or_uncertain + bound_client_confident → consider attach_document as additional safe option (next fix)

cases.caseName: Low confidence classification (< 0.5) — ambiguous fallback
cases.actualBehavior: CORRECT: ambiguous_needs_input
cases.rootCauseHypothesis: Correct behavior. Global confidence < 0.5 threshold is reasonable.

cases.caseName: Unsupported / unusable image (general_unusable_image)
cases.actualBehavior: CORRECT: no_action_archive_only — zero actions
cases.responseMapperPath: buildIntakeMessage → case 'no_action_archive_only' → 'Na obrázku jsem nenašel použitelné CRM informace.'
cases.rootCauseHypothesis: Correct. No actions for unusable images.

cases.caseName: Active client context wins correctly when image matches
cases.actualBehavior: CORRECT: client_message_update + attach_document
cases.rootCauseHypothesis: Works correctly.

cases.caseName: Active client context downgraded when identity mismatch
cases.expectedBehavior: binding reset to insufficient_binding; suppressedActiveClientId preserved
cases.actualBehavior: CORRECT: binding reset; suppressedActiveClientId CTA available in response-mapper
cases.rootCauseHypothesis: Works correctly. Token overlap name matching may fail for diacritics.

cases.caseName: Missing client context → ambiguous_needs_input
cases.actualBehavior: CORRECT: ambiguous_needs_input + focus_composer hint in response
cases.routeDecisionReason: binding-v2.ts: no session lock, no activeClientId → insufficient_binding
cases.rootCauseHypothesis: Routing is correct. But the message is technical, not advisor-friendly.

cases.caseName: Multiple client matches → ambiguous
cases.actualBehavior: CORRECT: ambiguous_needs_input
cases.rootCauseHypothesis: Correct — no auto-pick on ambiguous CRM matches.

cases.caseName: Weak candidate binding → ambiguous
cases.actualBehavior: CORRECT: ambiguous_needs_input; response-mapper adds suggestedNextSteps with candidate name
cases.responseMapperPath: mapImageIntakeToAssistantResponse → suggestedNextSteps: 'Potvrďte, zda obrázek patří klientovi'
cases.rootCauseHypothesis: Correct behavior.

cases.caseName: Household ambiguous case
cases.actualBehavior: client_message_update (plan unaffected by household state); household warning only in suggestedNextSteps
cases.executionPlanSummary: create_internal_note + create_task + attach_document (assigned to primaryClientId, potentially wrong)
cases.routeDecisionReason: household binding does NOT affect outputMode; it only adds to suggestedNextSteps in response-mapper
cases.rootCauseHypothesis: Household ambiguity does not change outputMode or block write actions. Advisor may accidentally assign note/attach to wrong household member. Warning in suggestedNextSteps is easily missed.
cases.recommendedFixArea: orchestrator.ts + planner.ts: household_ambiguous should downgrade binding to weak_candidate or trigger ambiguous_needs_input gate

cases.caseName: Unknown client case (source: none)
cases.actualBehavior: CORRECT: ambiguous_needs_input
cases.routeDecisionReason: binding-v2.ts: no session, no activeClientId, no name signal → insufficient_binding
cases.rootCauseHypothesis: Correct.

cases.caseName: Multiple CRM client matches
cases.actualBehavior: CORRECT: ambiguous_needs_input, zero actions
cases.rootCauseHypothesis: Correct — no auto-pick.

cases.caseName: Document image that should become note only (supporting_reference_set)
cases.actualBehavior: FIXED (Fix 3): attachDocumentToClient + createInternalNote both always present
cases.routeDecisionReason: documentSetResult.decision === 'supporting_reference_set' → V4 retains attach + always adds note (Fix 3)
cases.rootCauseHypothesis: RESOLVED. See A07. Fix 3 applied.

cases.caseName: Document image that should become attach_to_client
cases.actualBehavior: CORRECT: structured_image_fact_intake — attach_document + create_internal_note
cases.rootCauseHypothesis: Works correctly with bound client.

cases.caseName: Identity document → create-contact draft
cases.actualBehavior: CORRECT (when multimodal enabled): buildIdentityContactIntakeActionPlan → createContact + attachDocumentToClient
cases.bindingResult: insufficient_binding (but G2 exempt for identity mode)
cases.responseMapperPath: buildIntakeMessage → case 'identity_contact_intake' → 'Připravil jsem návrh nového klienta z nahraných dokladů.'
cases.rootCauseHypothesis: Works when multimodal is enabled. Fails silently when multimodal flag is off.

cases.caseName: Review-like doc → handoff candidate
cases.expectedBehavior: no_action_archive_only + AI Review recommendation + createInternalNote as only action
cases.actualBehavior: CORRECT: no_action_archive_only + safety flag + createInternalNote 'Uložit jako orientační poznámku (AI Review doporučen)'
disabledReasons: buildActionPlanV3 (planner.ts:318-338): handoffReady=true → outputMode forced to no_action_archive_only
recommendedActions replaced with single createInternalNote + handoff signal
cases.responseMapperPath: buildIntakeMessage → case 'no_action_archive_only' → handoff.recommended → 'Obrázek vypadá jako kandidát na AI Review: ...'
cases.rootCauseHypothesis: AI Review handoff is ADVISORY only — decideLane() is hardcoded to image_intake. Advisor must manually submit to AI Review queue. No explicit CTA button for submitting to AI Review in the response.
cases.recommendedFixArea: response-mapper.ts: add explicit 'Odeslat do AI Review' suggestedAction CTA for handoff mode

cases.caseName: Case where action is disabled and why (attach without binding)
cases.expectedBehavior: attach disabled — acceptable; but create_internal_note should be available
cases.actualBehavior: FIXED (Fix 2): create_internal_note now proposed as unlinked safe fallback; attach correctly disabled
cases.rootCauseHypothesis: RESOLVED. Fix 2 added create_internal_note as safe fallback for ambiguous_needs_input.

cases.caseName: Case where generic copilot fallback is incorrectly used
cases.expectedBehavior: Image-intake-specific message reflecting communication screenshot type
cases.actualBehavior: FIXED (Fix 1): communication screenshots now get client_message_update — no longer falls into ambiguous for this inputType
cases.routeDecisionReason: Fix 1: communication screenshots bypass binding check in resolveOutputMode
cases.rootCauseHypothesis: RESOLVED for communication screenshots. For other types with ambiguous binding, response text is still generic — will be addressed in next fix (response-mapper.ts).
cases.recommendedFixArea: response-mapper.ts → buildIntakeMessage case 'ambiguous_needs_input': add inputType-aware message branches (next fix)

cases.caseName: Case where response contains technical/internal wording
cases.actualBehavior: whyThisAction contains 'confidence 75%', 'ambiguous'. buildIntakeMessage case 'structured_image_fact_intake' outputs 'confidence X%'
cases.responseMapperPath: planner.ts:whyThisAction() → previewPayload.summary → shown to advisor in preview UI
cases.rootCauseHypothesis: planner.ts whyThisAction() generates debug-style text with confidence percentages and inputType codes. This flows into previewPayload.summary without sanitization. Also buildIntakeMessage for structured_image_fact_intake outputs 'confidence X%' in the advisor message.
cases.recommendedFixArea: planner.ts: remove confidence % from whyThisAction; OR response-mapper.ts: sanitize before display

cases.caseName: Case where response is advisor-facing and correct (identity mode)
cases.expectedBehavior: Advisor-friendly text about detected document type and proposed actions
cases.actualBehavior: CORRECT: 'Rozpoznán osobní doklad (občanka, pas nebo povolení k pobytu). Připravili jsme návrh nového klienta a přiložení podkladů.'
cases.rootCauseHypothesis: This is the GOLD STANDARD response — advisor-friendly, action-oriented, no technical terms.

cases.caseName: Paste 1 image — pending asset only, no autosend
cases.actualBehavior: CORRECT: 1 asset, truncated=false
cases.rootCauseHypothesis: Correct.

cases.caseName: Paste 2 images — pending assets only, no autosend
cases.actualBehavior: CORRECT: 2 assets, truncated=false
cases.rootCauseHypothesis: Correct.

cases.caseName: Paste 5 images — max 4 accepted, warning
cases.expectedBehavior: 4 assets accepted, truncated=true, warning added by route-handler
cases.actualBehavior: CORRECT: 4 assets, truncated=true, warning='Nahráno více než 4 obrázky — zpracovány jsou jen první čtyři.'
cases.rootCauseHypothesis: Correct.

cases.caseName: Picker upload — no autosend
cases.actualBehavior: CORRECT: all actions have requiresConfirmation=true from planner; G5 guardrail enforces this
cases.rootCauseHypothesis: Correct — no autosend.

cases.caseName: Send with pending images only
cases.expectedBehavior: Pipeline runs, all actions require confirmation, executionState=awaiting_confirmation
cases.actualBehavior: CORRECT: all actions requiresConfirmation=true; executionState.status='awaiting_confirmation'
cases.executionPlanSummary: create_internal_note + create_task + attach_document; all require confirmation
cases.rootCauseHypothesis: Correct.

cases.caseName: Send with text + pending images
cases.actualBehavior: CORRECT: classifyByTextHints regex DOCUMENT_TEXT_HINTS matches 'smlouva' → photo_or_scan_document layer 1 promotion
cases.rootCauseHypothesis: Text hint promotion works correctly.

rootCauseMatrix.symptom: Communication screenshot without client → zero actions
rootCauseMatrix.rootCause: resolveOutputMode: binding check fires BEFORE inputType check

rootCauseMatrix.symptom: Document without client → zero actions, no create_internal_note fallback
rootCauseMatrix.rootCause: buildActionPlanV1 case 'ambiguous_needs_input': recommendedActions = [] — no safe fallback action

rootCauseMatrix.symptom: Note action missing for supporting_reference_set with bound client
rootCauseMatrix.rootCause: buildActionPlanV4 case supporting_reference_set filtered to attachDocumentToClient only

rootCauseMatrix.symptom: Identity documents don't trigger create-contact draft
rootCauseMatrix.rootCause: detectIdentityContactIntakeSignals requires multimodal pass facts; feature flag isImageIntakeMultimodalEnabledForUser controls this
whyThisAction() includes confidence percentages and inputType codes; response-mapper does not sanitize

rootCauseMatrix.symptom: Mixed image set + bound client → only note, no attach
rootCauseMatrix.rootCause: mixed_or_uncertain_image always → ambiguous_needs_input; Fix 2 added note but attach missing

rootCauseMatrix.symptom: Household ambiguous does not affect outputMode or block wrong-client assignment
rootCauseMatrix.rootCause: resolveHouseholdBinding result is additive context only; not used in planner binding evaluation

rootCauseMatrix.symptom: AI Review handoff has no explicit CTA to submit
rootCauseMatrix.rootCause: decideLane() hardcoded to image_intake; handoff is soft recommendation only; no submit CTA in response-mapper

rootCauseMatrix.symptom: Communication screenshot confidence threshold may reject valid screenshots
rootCauseMatrix.rootCause: 0.65 threshold for screenshot_client_communication in planner.ts:78 may be too high for real screenshots

rootCauseMatrix.symptom: Identity match still proposes createContact (duplicate client risk)
rootCauseMatrix.rootCause: When identityDocumentLikelyMatchesActiveContact → match, orchestrator still calls buildIdentityContactIntakeActionPlan

recommendedFixOrder.description: DONE — planner.ts → resolveOutputMode(): reorder checks — inputType before binding for screenshot_client_communication
recommendedFixOrder.impact: Fixed COMM_NO_CLIENT_01 (blocker) — most common advisor use case

recommendedFixOrder.description: DONE — planner.ts → buildActionPlanV1 case 'ambiguous_needs_input': add create_internal_note as safe fallback without contactId
DONE — planner.ts → buildActionPlanV4 case 'supporting_reference_set': always add createInternalNote alongside attachDocumentToClient
response-mapper.ts → buildIntakeMessage case 'ambiguous_needs_input': add inputType-aware message branches
recommendedFixOrder.impact: Fixes GENERIC_FALLBACK_24 (medium) — advisor gets context-aware message for documents without binding

recommendedFixOrder.description: planner.ts whyThisAction(): remove confidence % from output; use human-friendly explanations
Feature flag audit: verify isImageIntakeMultimodalEnabledForUser for all production tenants; add fallback or documentation
recommendedFixOrder.impact: Fixes IDENTITY_NO_CLIENT_04 (high) — identity intake requires multimodal

recommendedFixOrder.description: planner.ts → resolveOutputMode: mixed_or_uncertain_image + bound_client_confident → attach_document as additional safe option
recommendedFixOrder.impact: Improves MIXED_SET_08 (medium — note already available via Fix 2)

recommendedFixOrder.description: orchestrator.ts + binding-v2.ts: household_ambiguous should downgrade binding or add explicit ambiguity gate
response-mapper.ts: add explicit 'Odeslat do AI Review' suggestedAction CTA for handoff recommendation mode
orchestrator.ts step 12-14: when identityDocumentLikelyMatchesActiveContact → match → use attach-only plan
recommendedFixOrder.impact: Fixes IDENTITY_ACTIVE_MATCH_06 (medium) — prevents duplicate contact proposal
